content:
Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Porto",
    "full_address": "Porto, Portugal",
    "image": "https://www.visitportugal.com/sites/default/files/styles/header_image/public/styles/header_image/public/images/porto_guide_header.jpg?itok=5021xS0Y",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```
